'''Soe''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] soldier living during the [[war against Zakuul]]. She was a member of the [[Eternal Alliance]] and was part of the [[Eternal Alliance Recon Unit|Alliance Recon Unit]], created and deployed in response to various uprisings sparkling across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] following the death of the [[Eternal Empire]] Empress [[Vaylin]] and reorganization of Alliance into the Eternal Alliance. Along with the rest of the unit Soe participated in such crisises as reclaiming the stolen plans for the [[Alliance base]] from the [[Dust Vipers]] pirates, liberating [[Port Nowhere]] from [[Crimson Fang]] takeover and neutralizing Sith Lords [[Adacin]] and [[Zanisk]] in the former [[Separatist stronghold]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]].<ref name="SWTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Soe appears in ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Knights of the Eternal Throne]]'' during various Uprisings.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Knights of the Eternal Throne]]'' {{1st}}
